mapper.select: select r.id,r.name,r.description,r.material,r.category,r.image_path as imagePath, group_concat(i.icon_path separator ',') as iconPath from zubora_recipes r left join icons i ON r.material like concat('%', i.icon_name, '%') group by r.id

select r.id,r.name,r.description,r.material,r.category,r.image_path as imagePath, group_concat(i.icon_path separator ',') as iconPath from zubora_recipes r left join icons i on r.material like concat('%', i.icon_name, '%') where r.id=#{id} group by r.id

select r.id,r.name,r.description,r.material,r.category,r.image_path as imagePath, group_concat(i.icon_path separator ',') as iconPath from zubora_recipes r left join icons i on r.material like concat('%', i.icon_name, '%') where r.category = #{category} group by r.id
